scope: UI chrome only (--ui-* tokens). Canvas content (--preset-*/--content-*) excluded per profile.md:52-55.
harness: Scan(color-pair usage sites) -> Measure(relative-luminance contrast ratio) -> Grade
summary: Two dark-UI text tokens fail AA for normal text on EVERY shell background: --ui-text-dim (#555, 1.8-2.3:1) and --text-hint (#5a5a5a, 2.0-2.5:1). --ui-text-muted (#777) fails normal-text AA on all backgrounds (3.0-3.9:1) but passes the 3:1 large/UI floor. --ui-accent-primary (#2d6fe8) used as 9px text fails AA-normal (3.3:1). All luminances computed; render-side confirmation (effective bg under alpha layers, actual font-size/weight) deferred to center.

findings.title: --ui-text-dim (#555555) fails AA on all UI backgrounds — used as body/label/placeholder text
findings.evidence: #555555 contrast: on --ui-bg-app #1a1a1a = 2.33:1; on --ui-bg-base #1e1e1e = 2.24:1; on --ui-bg-elevated #242424 = 2.08:1; on --ui-bg-card #252525 = 2.06:1; on --ui-bg-input #2a2a2a = 1.93:1; on --ui-bg-hover #2e2e2e = 1.82:1. AA-normal 4.5 FAIL on all, AA-large 3.0 FAIL on all. Used at 9-11px (normal text) so 4.5:1 applies. Largest fail margin in the system.
findings.usage_count: ~109 color: declarations (panels 31, extra 24, props 23, base 18, blocks 4, toast 5, claude-pm 2, graph 2)

findings.title: --text-hint (#5a5a5a) fails AA on all UI backgrounds — prop-hint / section-title
findings.evidence: #5a5a5a contrast: on #1a1a1a = 2.52:1; on #1e1e1e = 2.42:1; on #242424 = 2.25:1; on #252525 = 2.22:1; on #2a2a2a = 2.08:1; on #2e2e2e = 1.97:1. AA-normal 4.5 FAIL, AA-large 3.0 FAIL on all backgrounds. Hint/section-title text at <=10px = normal text, 4.5:1 required.
findings.note: Semantic token --text-hint (design-tokens.css) and --ui-text-dim (editor-base.css) are near-identical low-contrast values; the token-system duplication (D-color) compounds this.

findings.title: --ui-text-muted (#777777) fails AA-normal on all UI backgrounds (passes 3:1 floor only)
selectors: editor-layout.css (3x), claude-pm.css (3x), toast (3x), assets-panel (2x), blocks (2x), canvas (1x)
findings.evidence: #777777 contrast: on #1a1a1a = 3.89:1; on #1e1e1e = 3.72:1; on #242424 = 3.47:1; on #252525 = 3.42:1; on #2a2a2a = 3.21:1; on #2e2e2e = 3.03:1. AA-normal 4.5 FAIL on all; AA-large/UI 3.0 PASS on all. Blocker where used as normal-size text (most usages are <=12px labels); demote to OK only where verified >=18px or >=14px bold.

findings.title: --ui-accent-primary (#2d6fe8) as 9px category-tag text fails AA-normal
findings.evidence: #2d6fe8 contrast: on #1a1a1a = 3.77:1; on #1e1e1e = 3.61:1; on #242424 = 3.36:1; on #252525 = 3.32:1; on #2a2a2a = 3.11:1; on #2e2e2e = 2.94:1. AA-normal 4.5 FAIL everywhere; AA-large 3.0 PASS except on bg-hover #2e2e2e (2.94 FAIL). The .tpl-card-cat/.tpl-preview-cat tags are 9px = normal text -> blocker. NOTE effective bg is text-on-rgba(45,111,232,0.12) tint over panel bg; center must render-measure the composited bg.
findings.note: 9px weight:700 is still 'normal' under WCAG (large = 18px / 14px-bold). Render confirm composited tint background.

findings.title: Raw #666 text literals fail AA on dark backgrounds (off-token)
findings.evidence: #666666 contrast: on #1a1a1a = 3.03:1; on #1e1e1e = 2.90:1; on #252525 = 2.67:1; on #2a2a2a = 2.50:1; on #2e2e2e = 2.37:1. AA-normal FAIL on all; AA-large PASS only on #1a1a1a. Hardcoded value bypasses token system AND fails contrast. editor-blocks:1166/1170 may be canvas content (excluded) -> verify surface before grading.
findings.note: Crosses into D-color (off-token raw hex). Flagged here only for the contrast failure.

passed_self.evidence: on #1a1a1a = 5.41:1, on #252525 = 4.77:1 — PASS (>=4.5 on all standard panel bgs; dips to 4.46 only on #2a2a2a input bg, where it is not used as text)
